title: Senior Financial Analyst - Care Ratings Capital India - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Care Ratings Capital India - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Care Ratings Capital India in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Care Ratings Capital India:
Care Ratings Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings Capital India!
